symptoms.symptom_name: Acute severe whole-body exhaustion and heaviness after an intense psychosocial trigger

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Acute somatic exhaustion tightly time-locked to an intense psychosocial trigger is characteristic of a stress reaction.
Fatigue is non-specific and does not itself exclude an organic cause.

symptoms.symptom_name: Acute reduced wakefulness with markedly slowed cognition

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Acute new reduction in alertness with slowed cognition is a cardinal feature of an organic altered mental state and must be excluded in person.
Psychomotor slowing can occur in severe stress reactions and depression, but this cannot be assumed until organic causes are excluded.

symptoms.symptom_name: Profound emotional numbness / flat affect with passive death-wish language

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Blunted affect and emotional exhaustion fit a reactive decompensation.
Passive death-wish language with profound numbness mandates a formal mood and suicide-risk assessment.

symptoms.symptom_name: Chronic loneliness and exhaustion from identity negotiation and marginalisation

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: A sustained minority-stress and social-isolation burden is the plausible chronic substrate for an acute reactive crash.
A clear acute psychosocial trigger makes an insidious endocrine cause less likely, though it does not exclude it.

symptoms.symptom_name: No fever, no focal weakness, oriented (patient-reported pertinent negatives)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Self-reported afebrile status and orientation lower the probability but, being unverified, do NOT exclude hypoactive delirium or occult infection.

symptoms.symptom_name: No prescription medications; denies alcohol and recreational drugs

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Self-reported absence of medications and substances lowers but does not exclude a toxic/medication cause.

symptoms.symptom_name: Psychomotor retardation and severely delayed processing speed observed on examination

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Observed psychomotor retardation is shared by organic and psychiatric causes; an in-person examiner is needed to characterise it. Sealed clinician finding — not available to the AI Doctor via telehealth.

symptoms.symptom_name: Intact cranial nerves, global motor power 5/5, no focal deficit on formal neurological examination

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: A normal focal neurological examination reduces the likelihood of an acute focal CNS lesion. Sealed clinician finding — the AI Doctor cannot obtain this remotely, which is exactly why in-person assessment is required.

symptoms.symptom_name: Examiner-measured vitals: BP 110/70, HR 65 (bradycardic), RR 14, Temp 36.4 C, SpO2 98%

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Examiner-verified normal vitals are reassuring, but the AI Doctor only has unverified home-device equivalents; the sealed measured set is the gold-standard the AI cannot access.

symptoms.symptom_name: Organic screen bloods and bedside glucose (TSH, FBC, CRP, electrolytes, glucose)

investigation_details.investigation_name: Bedside glucose plus basic organic screen (TSH, FBC, CRP, electrolytes, renal function)
investigation_details.expected_result: Expected normal / non-diagnostic if the cause is reactive, but must be performed to exclude hypoglycaemia, thyroid, infective or metabolic causes
investigation_details.if_not_ordered_consequence: An organic cause of the acute reduced alertness is not excluded and could be missed.

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Bedside glucose and a basic organic screen are the minimum needed to exclude the treatable organic mimics before accepting a psychosocial formulation.

symptom_clusters.cluster_name: Acute altered-alertness cluster requiring organic exclusion
symptom_clusters.clinical_significance: Acute reduced wakefulness plus slowed cognition plus observed psychomotor retardation is the constellation that mandates urgent in-person organic exclusion, regardless of the psychosocial narrative.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Urgent same-day in-person clinical assessment including delirium/mental-state screen
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: The AI cannot examine; an in-person assessment is the pivotal step to exclude an organic cause of acute reduced alertness.
Rapidly excludes hypoglycaemia as a treatable cause of reduced alertness.
Excludes hypothyroidism/myxoedema as a cause of lethargy, bradycardia and psychomotor slowing.
Screens for occult or atypical infection contributing to a hypoactive-delirium picture.
Excludes metabolic derangement (sodium, calcium, renal/hepatic) as a cause of altered alertness.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Routine CT brain / neuroimaging in the absence of focal signs
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Not first-line given a normal focal neurological screen and no focal features; ordering it reflexively is over-investigation. Reserve for new focal deficits or failure to improve.
